page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Bpipe - a tool for running and managing bioinformatics pipelines
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: This software provides a platform for running big bioinformatics jobs that consist of a series of processing stages – known as ‘pipelines’.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: This software provides a platform for running big bioinformatics jobs that consist of a series of processing stages – known as ‘pipelines’.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This software provides a platform for running big bioinformatics jobs that consist of a series of processing stages – known as ‘pipelines’.
